info.name: CareQueue API - Complete Collection
info.description: Complete API collection for CareQueue Healthcare Platform - All Endpoints

body.raw: {"symptoms": "chest pain, left arm numb, heavy sweating"}

request.description: AI symptom triage. Returns priority, reason, confidence. Advisory only - never sets priority automatically.

body.raw:
{
  "patientId": "{{patientId}}",
  "appointmentId": "{{appointmentId}}",
  "diagnosis": "Common Cold",
  "medicines": [
    {
      "name": "Paracetamol",
      "dosage": "500mg",
      "frequency": "3 times a day",
      "duration": "5 days",
      "timing": "After meals",
      "instructions": "Take with warm water"
    }
  ],
  "tests": ["Blood test", "X-Ray"],
  "notes": "Rest for 3 days",
  "followUpDate": "2026-02-15",
  "followUpInstructions": "Visit if fever persists"
}

request.description: On-demand AI summary. PDFs use llama-3.1-8b-instant (text extraction). PNG/JPEG use llama-4-scout-17b (multimodal vision). Response includes transcriptionConfidence for images. Not stored in DB. Quota: 10/hour per user.
Returns a short-lived (5 min) signed Cloudinary URL to view an attached file.
Same endpoint for image files (PNG/JPEG). Response includes transcriptionConfidence: high|medium|low. Use fileIndex query param to target a specific file in the record.
